score_explanations.gross_margin: Avg 42% margin after FBA fees; low return rate due to non-fragile product
score_explanations.demand_satisfaction_gap: Reviews frequently mention 'flimsy dividers' and 'doesn't fit standard drawers' — room for a better-built option
score_explanations.revenue_concentration: Top 3 sellers hold 28% of revenue — moderate room for new entrants
score_explanations.capital_efficiency: Can stock 80+ units at $24.99 with $2K budget
score_explanations.barrier_to_entry: Simple bamboo/plastic manufacturing, no certifications needed

score_explanations.gross_margin: High 48% margin — low material cost, small/light for FBA shipping
score_explanations.demand_satisfaction_gap: Top complaint is durability — 'my dog destroyed it in 10 minutes' appears in 30%+ of 1-2 star reviews
score_explanations.revenue_concentration: Fragmented market — top 3 hold only 18% of reviews, many small sellers
score_explanations.capital_efficiency: At $14.99 avg price, $1.5K stocks 200+ units — excellent inventory turnover
score_explanations.barrier_to_entry: Simple rubber/nylon manufacturing, but must pass pet safety standards (CPSIA)

score_explanations.gross_margin: 52% margin — extremely low COGS ($2-4 wholesale), lightweight shipping
score_explanations.demand_satisfaction_gap: Market is somewhat saturated but 'snapping' and 'rolling up' are common complaints worth solving
score_explanations.revenue_concentration: Moderately concentrated — a few big brands (Fit Simplify, INTEY) dominate
score_explanations.capital_efficiency: Good unit economics but need variety packs to compete (5-band sets)
score_explanations.barrier_to_entry: Low barrier, but latex quality testing recommended to avoid injury liability

top_products.name: 5-Level Resistance Band Set with Carry Bag

score_explanations.gross_margin: 45% margin — very cheap to manufacture, FDA food-grade silicone is standard
score_explanations.demand_satisfaction_gap: Some complaints about 'curling edges' and 'chemical smell' — solvable with better materials
score_explanations.revenue_concentration: Top 3 hold 24% — room to enter with better branding
score_explanations.barrier_to_entry: Must be FDA food-safe certified, but testing is cheap ($200-400)

score_explanations.gross_margin: 38% margin — decent but higher return rate (compatibility issues) eats profit

score_explanations.revenue_concentration: Highly concentrated — iOttie and Mpow dominate with 40%+ market share
score_explanations.capital_efficiency: Moderate — need $3K for meaningful inventory due to SKU variety (car vs desk)
score_explanations.barrier_to_entry: Requires design differentiation and FCC compliance for magnetic mounts

score_explanations.gross_margin: 40% margin but bulky shipping increases FBA fees, especially for tall posts

score_explanations.revenue_concentration: Mid-range — several established brands but none dominant
score_explanations.capital_efficiency: Higher unit cost + bulky storage = need more capital for meaningful stock
score_explanations.barrier_to_entry: No certifications needed but packaging/shipping logistics are tricky for large items

score_explanations.gross_margin: 44% margin — low COGS for bamboo/metal organizers, good size-to-value ratio
score_explanations.demand_satisfaction_gap: Market is mature with fewer obvious pain points, but 'cheap feel' and 'wobbles' are common
score_explanations.revenue_concentration: Distributed market — many small brands, no single dominant player

score_explanations.barrier_to_entry: Very low — simple products, no certifications, easy to brand

score_explanations.gross_margin: 55% margin — oils are extremely cheap to bottle, high perceived value

score_explanations.revenue_concentration: Very concentrated — doTERRA, NOW, Plant Therapy own the space
score_explanations.capital_efficiency: Need variety sets (6-12 oils) to compete, which raises per-unit cost

score_explanations.gross_margin: 50% margin — EVA foam blocks cost $1-2 wholesale, straps even less
score_explanations.demand_satisfaction_gap: Mature market with satisfied customers — hard to find clear unmet needs

score_explanations.barrier_to_entry: No certifications, simple manufacturing, easy to private-label
